keeps.text: Disini gue ada uang 500 juta ... See you di konten.com

fluff_suggestions.text: cek link di video gue untuk dapetin total hadiah, ya total reward yang gue akan bagiin 500 juta rupiah
fluff_suggestions.note: Same idea stated 3x (total hadiah = total reward = 500 juta). The 500jt was already established at 0.0s and again at 30.6s. Could be trimmed to just the closing CTA — e.g. 'cek link di video gue, see you di konten.com'. Marked suggested only — does not affect render.

flags.issue: Triple-restated CTA ('total hadiah' / 'total reward' / '500 juta'). Consider trimming to one mention for punchier close.
flags.default: keep all (user can drop in editor)

flags.issue: 1.7s pause between 'pencet sesuatu gitu' and 'Ini udah gak perlu lagi' — feels natural, left in.
